title: save_block_state wraps tree+witnesses+tip in single SQLite transaction
description: db.rs save_block_state() atomically persists the Sapling commitment tree snapshot, all updated incremental witnesses, and the new scan tip height inside a single SQLite transaction. Without this, a crash between any two of these writes could leave the DB in a state where witnesses and scan_tip are inconsistent, causing note-unspendability or incorrect proof generation on restart. A contributor might suggest separate helper methods for each; the atomic combined write is the correct design and must be preserved.
